icon-size.tooltip: Size of the tray icons, in pixels. Lower this to match the panel's system icons.

icons-per-row.tooltip: How many icons the drawer shows per row before wrapping to a new row.

hide-note.description: By default all icons start hidden in the drawer behind the arrow. To choose which ones show on the panel: click the arrow to open the drawer, then right-click 11tray and switch icons off (off = shown on the panel). If the arrow is gone because nothing is hidden, turn on Panel edit mode (right-click the panel → Troubleshoot) to get a spot to right-click. You can also Ctrl+click any icon to move it in or out.
